commands.repair_reason: This is not a safe repair-lane candidate yet because the remaining blockers include draft state, missing contributor proof, and an unresolved security/product decision about TLS interception.; Needs attention: The patch intentionally intercepts Anthropic TLS traffic for a spawned Claude child and persists a local CA/key pair, so it needs explicit maintainer security and consent review.; Review finding: [P1] Keep the... (sha=0e774bdf6be0503b18772c72e32a77f6a40d99d8)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an experimental Anthropic `claude-cli-interactive` backend using a per-turn Bun wrapper with local TLS interception, reasoning JSONL reconstruction, config inheritance, static assets, tests, and related reasoning-stream wiring.

Reproducibility: yes. for the blocking PR defects: source inspection of latest head shows the default no-override path stores `bun` as the Claude binary and the package metadata omits the required TTY preload. I did not establish a live Claude subscription or Telegram run.
commands.review_followup: This is not a safe repair-lane candidate yet because the remaining blockers include draft state, missing contributor proof, and an unresolved security/product decision about TLS interception.

target.title: feat(anthropic): claude-cli-interactive backend — stream reasoning via local TLS proxy (experimental)
